Awesome Neovim

Collections of awesome Neovim plugins. Mostly targeting Neovim specific features.

Neovim is a Vim-based text editor engineered for extensibility and usability, to encourage new applications and contributions.

Wishlist

Have a problem a plugin can solve? Add it to the nvim-lua wishliststars179.

UI

Neovim supports a wide variety of UI's. You can find them listed on the Neovim wiki

Plugin

Plugin Manager

  • wbthomason/packer.nvimstars4.2k - A use-package inspired plugin manager for Neovim. Uses native packages, supports Luarocks dependencies, written in Lua, allows for expressive config.
  • savq/paq-nvimstars504 - Neovim package manager written in Lua.
  • NTBBloodbath/cheovimstars211 - Neovim configuration switcher written in Lua. Inspired by chemacs.

LSP

(requires Neovim 0.5)

  • neovim/nvim-lspconfigstars5.8k - Quickstart configurations for the Neovim LSP client.
  • nvim-lua/lsp-status.nvimstars529 - This is a Neovim plugin/library for generating statusline components from the built-in LSP client.
  • nvim-lua/lsp_extensions.nvimstars216 - Repo to hold a bunch of info & extension callbacks for built-in LSP.
  • RishabhRD/nvim-lsputilsstars376 - Better defaults for nvim-lsp actions.
  • glepnir/lspsaga.nvimstars2k - A light-weight lsp plugin based on Neovim built-in lsp with a highly performant UI.
  • kosayoda/nvim-lightbulbstars516 - The plugin shows a lightbulb in the sign column whenever a textDocument/codeAction is available at the current cursor position.
  • onsails/lspkind.nvimstars729 - The plugin adds vscode-like icons to Neovim lsp completions.
  • ojroques/nvim-lspfuzzystars282 - A small plugin to make the LSP client use FZF.
  • gfanto/fzf-lsp.nvimstars159 - Enable the power of fzf fuzzy search for the Neovim built in lsp.
  • ray-x/lsp_signature.nvimstars1.2k - Lsp signature hint when you type.
  • smjonas/inc-rename.nvimstars199 - Provides an incremental LSP rename command based on Neovim's command-preview feature.
  • rmagatti/goto-previewstars376 - Previewing native LSP's goto definition calls in floating windows.
  • nanotee/sqls.nvimstars104 - Sqls (sql database connection plugin + LSP client) plugin for Neovim.
  • jubnzv/virtual-types.nvimstars191 - Neovim plugin that shows type annotations as virtual text.
  • jose-elias-alvarez/typescript.nvimstars223 - Utilities to improve the TypeScript development experience for Neovim's built-in LSP client.
  • ray-x/navigator.luastars797 - Learn existing code quickly and navigate code like a breeze. A swiss army knife makes exploring LSP and 🌲Treesitter symbols a piece of 🍰.
  • simrat39/symbols-outline.nvimstars1.1k - A tree like view for symbols in Neovim using the Language Server Protocol. Supports all your favourite languages.
  • tamago324/nlsp-settings.nvimstars194 - A plugin for setting Neovim LSP with JSON files.
  • simrat39/rust-tools.nvimstars1.2k - Tools for better development in rust using Neovim's builtin LSP.
  • stevearc/aerial.nvimstars588 - A code outline window for skimming and quick navigation.
  • jose-elias-alvarez/null-ls.nvimstars2.1k - Use Neovim as a language server to inject LSP diagnostics, code actions, and more via Lua.
  • jakewvincent/texmagic.nvimstars26 - Enhance the lspconfig settings for Texlab by defining any number of custom LaTeX build engines and selecting them with magic comments.
  • nanotee/nvim-lsp-basicsstars24 - Basic wrappers for LSP features.
  • weilbith/nvim-code-action-menustars385 - A floating pop-up menu for code actions to show code action information and a diff preview.
  • mfussenegger/nvim-lintstars433 - An asynchronous linter plugin for Neovim (>= 0.5) complementary to the built-in Language Server Protocol support.
  • b0o/SchemaStore.nvimstars291 - A Neovim Lua plugin providing access to the SchemaStorestars1.9k catalog.
  • ldelossa/litee.nvimstars281 - Neovim's missing IDE features.
  • j-hui/fidget.nvimstars769 - Standalone UI for LSP progress.
  • scalameta/nvim-metalsstars235 - Neovim plugin for Metals, the Scala language server, using Neovim's builtin LSP.
  • junnplus/nvim-lsp-setupstars187 - A simple wrapper for nvim-lspconfig and nvim-lsp-installer to easily setup LSP servers.
  • amrbashir/nvim-docs-viewstars49 - A Neovim plugin to display lsp hover documentation in a side panel.
  • mfussenegger/nvim-jdtlsstars424 - Extensions for the built-in LSP support in Neovim for eclipse.jdt.ls.
LSP Installer
  • anott03/nvim-lspinstallstars88 - Easy to install language servers.
  • alexaandru/nvim-lspupdatestars87 - Updates installed (or auto installs if missing) LSP servers.
  • williamboman/mason.nvimstars2.1k - Portable package manager for Neovim that runs everywhere Neovim runs. Easily install and manage LSP servers, DAP servers, linters, and formatters.
Diagnostics
  • andrewferrier/textobj-diagnosticstars80 - Text object for diagnostics (such as those generated by LSP servers).
  • ~whynothugo/lsp_lines.nvim - A Neovim plugin that renders diagnostics using virtual lines on top of the real line of code.
  • onsails/diaglist.nvimstars124 - Live render workspace diagnostics in quickfix, buffer diagnostics in loclist.
  • folke/trouble.nvimstars2.2k - A pretty diagnostics list to help you solve all the trouble your code is causing.
  • folke/lsp-colors.nvimstars366 - A plugin that adds missing LSP diagnostics highlight groups for color schemes that don't yet support the builtin LSP client.

Fuzzy Finder

  • ibhagwan/fzf-luastars787 - The Lua version of fzf.vim, high-performance and fully async, supports nvim-web-devicons, git indicators, LSP, quickfix/location lists and more. Also supports skim as its fzf binary.

Colorscheme

Tree-sitter Supported Colorscheme

Tree-sitter is a new system introduced in Neovim 0.5 that incrementally parses your code into a tree that works, even with errors in your syntax. These colorschemes have specifically set colors for Tree-sitter highlight groups. Vim colorschemes will work with the new groups out of the box.

  • shaeinst/roshnivim-csstars42 - Colorscheme for Neovim written in Lua, specially made for roshnivim with Tree-sitter support.
  • rafamadriz/neonstars101 - Customizable colorscheme with excellent italic and bold support, dark and light variants. Made to work and look good with Tree-sitter.
  • tomasiser/vim-code-darkstars794 - A dark color scheme heavily inspired by the look of the Dark+ scheme of Visual Studio Code.
  • Mofiqul/vscode.nvimstars295 - A Lua port of vim-code-dark colorscheme for Neovim with vscode light and dark theme.
